safetyRules.text: Stop the session on pain, numbness, tingling, or loss of stick control.
If tensionScore or forearmPumpScore is 7 or higher, switch to low_tension_rebuild.
Run speed_breakthrough no more than twice per week and not on consecutive days.
Add 5 BPM only after 2 clean minutes with even sound and relaxed rebound.

blocks.label: Free Stroke
instructions: Use eighth notes.
Let the stick rebound naturally.
Keep the grip soft and the sound even.

blocks.label: Finger Rebound
blocks.goal: Catch and guide rebound with fingers.
instructions: Keep the stroke small but not cramped.
Use fingers to bring the stick back.
Work hands separately before alternating.

blocks.label: Singles RLRL
instructions: Start below clean BPM.
Increase only when timing and sound stay even.
Back off 10 BPM if shoulders or forearms tighten.

blocks.label: Doubles RRLL
instructions: Make the second note intentional, not accidental bounce.
Use fingers to return the stick.
Practice slowly enough that both notes sound clear.

blocks.label: Moeller + Fingers
blocks.goal: Accent with a relaxed whip, then maintain rebound.
instructions: Accent every fourth note.
Keep the three following notes small and relaxed.
Do not force volume with the forearm.

blocks.label: Burst 8 fast / 8 slow
instructions: Play 8 fast strokes, then 8 slow strokes.
The fast part must stay clean.
Stop increasing BPM after the first sign of squeezing.

blocks.label: Buzz Roll
instructions: Use light pressure.
Avoid squeezing the stick into the pad.
Keep shoulders and jaw relaxed.

blocks.label: Free Pad Improvisation
instructions: Use only patterns that stay relaxed.
Mix singles, doubles, accents, and rests.
Prioritize sound over density.

sessions.label: Low Tension Rebuild 23
sessions.goal: Rebuild relaxed rebound when forearms overwork.

progression.promotionRule: Promote BPM after 2 clean minutes with soundEvenness >= 4 and tensionScore <= 5.
progression.regressionRule: Drop 10 BPM or switch session if timing falls apart or tensionScore >= 7.
progression.deloadRule: Reduce volume by 20-30% every fourth week or after three sessions with declining clean BPM.
